calendar.matters:
NOTICE HEARING FOR NAME CHANGE OF A MINOR
Off Calendar Sep-08-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Contested Name Change of Minor, Jackson West Greeley.

Dept. 505; Judge: Harry L. Jacobs; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:56 p.m., pausing at 2:15 p. m., commencing at 2:25 p.m. and concluded at 2:41 p.m. (D505)

Nyssa Noell Francis, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Sara West by Zoom Video Conference.
Petitioner Sara West was present by Zoom Video Conference, was placed under oath and testified.
Respondent Matthew Greeley appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Proof of service filed May 1, 2023.
Objection filed May 22, 2023.

The Court heard the testimonies and rules in favor of the Petitioner Sara West.

The Court grants the Change of Name of the Minor as follows:

Jackson West-Greeley

Decree changing name is signed and filed this day.
